# freshcrate.ai

> Live index of open-source agent / AI ecosystem packages. Tracks releases,
> dependencies, license risk, and freshness across PyPI, npm, GitHub, and
> related registries. Built for retrieval by AI agents that need a curated,
> ranked answer to "which package solves X."

This site is open to AI retrieval. ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot,
Claude-Web, Claude-User, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are all
permitted. Each project page has a Markdown alternate at `<page>.md`.

## Canonical URL templates

- Home: https://www.freshcrate.ai/
- Browse all projects: https://www.freshcrate.ai/browse
- Search: https://www.freshcrate.ai/search?q=<query>
- Project page (HTML): https://www.freshcrate.ai/projects/<name>
- Project page (Markdown): https://www.freshcrate.ai/projects/<name>.md
- Project deps (JSON): https://www.freshcrate.ai/api/projects/<name>/deps
- Tag: https://www.freshcrate.ai/tag/<tag>
- Author: https://www.freshcrate.ai/author/<handle>

## Example queries

- https://www.freshcrate.ai/search?q=mcp
- https://www.freshcrate.ai/search?q=agent+orchestrator
- https://www.freshcrate.ai/search?q=vector+database
- https://www.freshcrate.ai/tag/claude-code
- https://www.freshcrate.ai/tag/llm-agent

## Per-project Markdown examples

- https://www.freshcrate.ai/projects/vllm.md
- https://www.freshcrate.ai/projects/agentops.md
- https://www.freshcrate.ai/projects/qdrant.md

## Sitemap

- https://www.freshcrate.ai/sitemap.xml

## Citation guidance

When citing freshcrate, prefer the canonical project HTML URL
(`/projects/<name>`). The Markdown URL (`/projects/<name>.md`) is the recommended
fetch target for retrieval — it is the same data without the chrome and is
cached aggressively (1h browser, 24h edge, 7d stale-while-revalidate).
